narrative: US-Iran military exchanges and Middle East escalation introduce a geopolitical risk premium—USD/JPY holds at 156.84 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-premium demand; gold higher +0.49% near $4,734; equities -0.38%; DXY +0.10%; VIX 17.1. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence (+1.206% spread) remains the dominant G8 theme as RBNZ hike bias contrasts with CAD weakness. EUR/USD edges to 1.1740 on peace optimism despite looming US tariff threats. Watch US NFP at 12:30 UTC for the next macro catalyst.
